mapper.select: SELECT event_id, trade_id, event_type, event_time, operator_id, before_status, after_status, event_amount, event_rate, related_trade_id, remark, audit_snapshot FROM fx_trade_lifecycle WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId} ORDER BY event_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_trade_lifecycle (trade_id, event_type, event_time, operator_id, before_status, after_status, event_amount, event_rate, related_trade_id, remark, audit_snapshot) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{eventType}, NOW(), #{operatorId}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{eventAmount}, #{eventRate}, #{relatedTradeId}, #{remark}, #{auditSnapshot})
